project.name: API Sheriff (relocated to de.cuioss.sheriff.gateway)
project.description: Relocation stub. The groupId de.cuioss.sheriff.api was abandoned after an accidental release on 2026-07-12 and replaced by de.cuioss.sheriff.gateway. The artifactId is unchanged. This POM carries no code and exists only so resolvers redirect and emit a relocation warning.

relocation.message: The groupId de.cuioss.sheriff.api is abandoned. Its only release, 1.0.0, was published accidentally on 2026-07-12 from a project still in pre-1.0 development and was never intended for use. The project now publishes under de.cuioss.sheriff.gateway and has restarted its version line at 0.1.0-SNAPSHOT; there is no 1.x release under the new coordinates. Update the groupId to de.cuioss.sheriff.gateway and select a version once one is released. Java packages moved from de.cuioss.sheriff.api.. to de.cuioss.sheriff.gateway.. as well; the gRPC wire service paths are unchanged. See https://github.com/cuioss/api-sheriff/blob/main/doc/development/release-process.adoc
